[semantic.affine-reuse] Error: affine value `text` is consumed more than once in `duplicate`
   ╭─[ examples/invalid/affine_reuse.sarif:6:30 ]
   │
 6 │     consume(text) == consume(text)
   │                              ──┬─  
   │                                ╰─── affine value `text` is consumed more than once in `duplicate`
   │ 
   │ Help: Use `text` once in executable code or introduce an explicit borrow form later; the first move is at [92..96].
───╯
check failed
